title: Added Local Analytics Tag Groups API
summary: Started Phase 4 analytics service consolidation by adding a dedicated local Studio analytics API adapter and serving Tag Groups data through the app server.
effect: The local Tag Groups view now reads group-description data from /studio/api/analytics/tag-groups when running under the local Studio app, while preserving the static JSON fallback for unmigrated Jekyll contexts. This establishes the analytics route-module pattern without moving analytics write mutations yet.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the local app server, analytics API adapter, and focused tests
tests/smoke/local_studio_app_tag_groups.py passed and confirmed the view requested /studio/api/analytics/tag-groups instead of assets/studio/data/tag_groups.json
